name: Zucchini with Cheese
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup olive oil or salad oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Lightly grease an 8-inch x 8-inch x 2-inch dish.
3. Scrub the zucchini clean.
4. Cut the zucchini crosswise into 1/4 inch slices.
5. In a bowl, combine flour with salt, oregano, and pepper.
6. Toss the zucchini slices in the seasoned flour to coat them well.
7. Heat oil in a large heavy skillet over medium heat.
8. Saute the zucchini slices until they are browned.
9. Drain the sauteed zucchini on paper towels.
10. Place the zucchini slices at the bottom of the prepared dish.
11. Add tomato slices on top of the zucchini.
12. Mix the remaining oregano, salt, and sour cream in a bowl.
13. Spread the mixture over the tomatoes.
14. Sprinkle grated parmesan cheese over the top.
15. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until the cheese is melted.
